parents.subject: LU-19886 utils: fix buffer overflow in lshowmount nidlist

commit.subject: LU-19894 osd: disable batch allocation on non-extent files
commit.message:
LU-19894 osd: disable batch allocation on non-extent files

it doesn't make sense to allocate few blocks one by one, but
transaction will need more credits.

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
